title: observability-mcp connector hub — catalog entry
description: One file per connector under hub/catalog/<name>.json. build-catalog.mjs validates each against this schema and aggregates them into hub/catalog/index.json. The hub is a static catalog (no server): tarballs + signatures are fetched directly from the URLs below and verified with the same trust-root model the server uses (see docs/plugin-architecture.md).

name.description: Connector type id; matches the plugin manifest `name` and `sources.yaml` type.

tier.description: official = maintained in this repo; certified = reviewed; third-party = community, unreviewed.

builtin.description: True for connectors bundled in the server image (prometheus, loki). Listed for discoverability; no install step needed.

versions.description: Newest first. Each entry is independently verifiable.

integrity.description: sha256 of the plugin entry file; mirrors the manifest `integrity`.
